title: Login Authentication Failure
description: User unable to log in despite correct credentials. Error 403 shown.

description: Stripe integration timing out during checkout process on mobile devices.

title: Dashboard Metric Lag
description: The 'Open Tickets' counter on the admin dashboard lags by 5 minutes.

title: Update FAQ Documentation
description: The help center article for password resets is outdated.

title: Email Notification Bug
description: Customers are not receiving 'Ticket Created' confirmation emails.

title: API Rate Limit Error
description: Third-party CRM sync hitting limits every hour. Need optimization.

title: UI Alignment on Firefox
description: Navigation bar is overlapping with the sidebar on Firefox v120+.

title: Database Optimization
description: Slow query performance on ticket search for large datasets.

title: Broken Image Links
description: Profile pictures on user avatars are showing 404 errors.

title: Refund Request processing
description: Customer requested refund for transaction #99821. Waiting for approval.

title: Security Vulnerability Patch
description: Need to update NPM packages to address security advisory CVE-2026.

title: Mobile App Crash
description: App crashes immediately upon opening the 'History' tab on Android.

title: Incorrect Sales Tax Calc
description: Tax calculation for UK residents is not applying the 20% VAT correctly.

title: New Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Request to add a dark mode toggle for the customer portal.

title: Bulk Upload Failure
description: CSV upload failing when file contains more than 500 rows.
